login.signInSubtext: Twishimiye ko wagarutse. Reka dukomeze kwiga no gukura, hamwe.
login.ogeraDescription: Ogera ni ikigo cy'akazi cy'abanyeshuri muri Afrika gihuza abanyeshuri bafite intego n'amahirwe n'amafaranga ya simu.
login.ogeraDedicated: Ogera yihariye gukemura ingorane abanyeshuri bahura nazo.
login.enter2FACode: Injiza kode y'imibare 6 kuva kuri Google Authenticator kugira ngo uzuze kwinjira.

register.connectTrustedEmployers: Huza n'abashoramari bizerwa, kubona amafaranga byihuse binyuze ku kwishyura simu, kandi ukomeze ubuhanga bwawe bwo kwiga – byose kuri gahunda imwe yateguwe abanyeshuri b'Afrika.
register.testimonial: Nabonye $500 ukwezi gushize nkomeza GPA yanjye ya 3.8! Gukurikira Ogera by'ishuri byantumye ntegereza.
register.enterBusinessId: Injiza indangamuntu yo kwiyandikisha ubucuruzi bwawe
register.registrationSuccess: Kwiyandikisha byakaze! Nyamuneka reba imeyili yawe kugira ngo ukemure konti yawe.

auth.forgotPasswordSubtext: Injiza imeyili yawe kuri gahunda yo gukemura. Tuzohereza kode y'imibare 4 kuri imeyili yawe.

trustScoreDescription.Limited: Intambwe yo kuraga nkeya. Komezagira ukuraga kugira ngo uborere inyuguti yawe y'icyizere n'uburenganzira.
trustScoreDescription.Emerging: Intambwe y'ibanze. Komezagira kuraga ineili, terefone n'isomo kugira ngo ufungure uburenganzira buuzuye.
trustScoreDescription.Developing: Iragaragaza ubushobozi n'ukuraga bamwe barangije. Birakenewa ukuraga kw'inyongera k'uburenganzira buuzuye.
trustScoreDescription.Competent: Imiterere nziza n'ukuraga runini rwarangiye. Ufite uburenganzira bwo kwinjira mu bikorwa by'ibanze by'ikirango.
trustScoreDescription.Exceptional: Yaragaze kandi mu miterere myiza. Ufite uburenganzira buuzuye bwo kwinjira mu bikorwa byose by'ikirango.
